data.name: 人間牧場〜實習編〜
data.detailed_description:
■故事

這是一個公共設立人類牧場的世界。 以成為「榨乳工」為目標的你前往實習的牧場。

在大家參訪時居然發生了緊急狀況?!!

參訪被迫中斷，你在設施裡到處亂晃，遇見了色情的乳牛大姊「綾那」。

綾那一眼就看上了你，邀請你親自「體驗」榨乳的過程！！

原本只是簡單地實習過程，但沒想到雙方卻陷入了愛情的漩渦。

■ 推薦要點!

這是一個專注於幫大歐派擠奶的遊戲。

如果你是喜歡歐派或是喜歡擠奶題材的人絕對不能錯過這款作品。

上吊榨乳、壓縮、野外露出、發情、土下座、教師Cos等等有多種玩法等你來發掘!

快來跟著色情的墮落乳牛大姊「綾那」一起在各種地方愛愛吧!

■ 綾那

在設施內遇到的母牛姐姐!

雖然有點傻傻的、但嘗試以大姊姊的身分跟主角進行接觸。

本來只是打算和你進行擠奶的實習而已…!?

如果成功讓對方傾心與你的話，還可以直接把她打包帶走喔!

■ 遊戲特色

  • 零戰鬥、純粹的探索RPG！
    可以讓女性迅速墮落且瘋狂產乳「M藥劑」究竟是從何而來。​
    一切的謎題將等你來探索。

  • 基本CG14張、色情事件15張！

  • 較長的色情事件和豐富的表情分差！

  • 懸吊、壓縮、野外、發情etc、各式各樣的Play手法！

data.short_description: 政府為了解決乳蛋白缺乏的問題，設立了人類牧場。 為了成為獨當一面的榨乳工，前往實習教學。 你是否能讓色情的乳牛姐姐成為於你的專屬肉便器呢?
data.supported_languages: 日文, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 法文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: Human Farm - Practice Section
data.detailed_description:
■Story

The game takes place in a world where public human farms are established.

With the goal of becoming a "milking worker",

you head to the farm where you are doing your internship.

However, an emergency occurs during the visit?!!

■ Key Point!

This is a game that focuses on milking the "big boob" If you are a fan of big boob or enjoy milking, you definitely shouldn't miss this game.

Suspension milking, compression, outdoor, estrus, etc, various types of sex wait for you!

Come and have fun with the lewd depraved cow girl "Ayana" and sex with her in various places!

■ Ayana

The cow sister encountered inside the facility!

Although she is a bit silly, she tries to interact with the main character as a big sister.

Originally, it was only intended to practice milking with you...!?

If you successfully make her fall, you can even take her away to go with you!

■ Features

  • non-battle, pure exploration RPG!
    Where does the "M-Drugs", which could let the woman fall rapidly and make numerous milk, come from?
    All the mysteries await you to explore.

  • 14 basic CGs, 15 sex scenes!

  • Longer sex scenes and diverse facial expressions!

  • Suspension, compression, outdoor, estrus, etc, various types of sex!

  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU

  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
